textByHashes.f450f93741369aa9e8875c195955dfd118061107: Do you want me to make some planks for you? Or would you be interested in some other housing supplies?
textByHashes.25204368c3374fe43cf6ad5d87a17f7517f01792: Ah, I was wondering when they would finally send over a member of the expedition.
textByHashes.4d103af91b87cffce536293763a72494c4508b17: None of the lumber here is appropriate for the task at hand, however, I've arranged a fairly generous deal between myself and the sawmill over in the Hosidius Woodcutting guild.
textByHashes.ad72614a795fd44e070cd85aebf2f74c1b47b694: You'll have to deliver the agreement to their sawmill operator, or a representative of the guild if you lack the requirements to enter.
textByHashes.d0ae3511e4cdfeef1e6ee32bfa30e7e76033ba14: That's good to hear. Once the document has been signed, bring it back to me and we'll get those supplies sent over to the foreman.
textByHashes.224e767bedfdd8ef1702419d17667153a9c41a71: Ah yes. You need to get those documents signed by the sawmill operator in the Woodcutting guild in Hosidius. If you lack the requirements to enter, a representative of the guild can sign it on the sawmill's behalf.
textByHashes.c82e8734301ab95b83aab17bcecd5ad88a70b15f: Ah yes, it was no easy feat, but I've managed to make some very high quality lumber out of the logs from the redwoods up there.
textByHashes.3fc485f8fc3939749b573a32c953b2c944892e92: Well, it certainly makes for an interesting material, I can imagine it being used for all sorts in the future...
textByHashes.ae391a68e3386f6b47b214440a4ff0d16276c558: Anyway, do you have the proposed deal on you? The sooner we set up our agreement the sooner we can ship these materials.
textByHashes.95b60911fb35d9d5b51949b571ef9f70cda8a19c: Well you'll need to let me see the proposal before I can agree to anything.
textByHashes.d146ced56b47ca42744682cdc060c1c3dd60c487: Excellent, hand it over and I'll just make sure everything looks in order.
textByHashes.c15397ccb05442150dbecf8c567b0cbd25d5e269: There you go. We'll ship the materials over to the Varrock sawmill immediately.
textByHashes.d67f62a8a2a6eb38882bf5ace09dbccff45efa0a: Everything has been signed, so you just need to take it back to the sawmill operator at the Varrock sawmill.
textByHashes.e10faf6daa22c720b043d766658e2a0a36b850fe: Great, do you have the documents with you?
textByHashes.6f7c860dd8221d81d0425c987c81aecd80836481: Well, I'll need it before I can send over these supplies.
textByHashes.443b7867ac0992d23220c22e9658a698e7a5b19e: That all looks to be in order. I'll get those supplies to the foreman right away.
textByHashes.3f2aca1ec0a54b0efe69ca1090906b01e19b5ac1: We're all done here, the foreman at the digsite should know what you need to do next.
textByHashes.13b62d0e3165a1fb3e639bc66c14714f94682e72: Nilsal. Do you want me to make some planks for you? I can make planks from wood, oak, teak and mahogany logs. Or would you like to buy some other housing supplies?
textByHashes.975407248b7f22d98efcd2cfc11c7395c3759b13: You'll need to bring me some more logs.
textByHashes.baf66abd328daa6d13ba9af87255cc6c88662a68: Those planks cost coins. You don't have enough money for all of them.
textByHashes.35534928f540dfe353c1bd020f513b2dfd4d577f: Well come back when you want some. You'll struggle to find quality planks anywhere but here!
textByHashes.447b945e108ee9c4a2c98fbcaa432ba2d4834c9d: Do you want me to make some planks for you? I can make planks from wood, oak, teak and mahogany logs. Or would you like to buy some other housing supplies?
textByHashes.b03b8cccadab6bd973245a7a3b6e9f7e2347315d: I can make planks from wood, oak, teak and mahogany. I don't make planks from other woods as they're no good for making furniture.
textByHashes.4f321214359e812a414ec17627a4fa05360311fa: Wood and oak are all over the place, but teak and mahogany can only be found in a few places like Karamja and Etceteria.
textByHashes.1124f4c25320973775af4cf7133944858a870fa4: Well come back when you want some. You can't get good quality planks anywhere but here!
textByHashes.72773fa70a4d432613ad445180708ef94a233460: Hello there. Do you want me to make some planks for you? I can make planks from wood, oak, teak and mahogany logs. Or would you like to buy some other housing supplies?
textByHashes.380a7c3bbdef9028ce8217fbdfb8856ee77c06a1: That old geezer? Oh, alright. I won't charge for this, since it's for him.
textByHashes.c6d57426649734a49dec3c2396235a858c5e8218: I don't know any Old Man Yarlo, and I'd rather not work with that horrible material.
textByHashes.6a9c8b760e725f5e38b7ddce94aa5240fb733b44: Perhaps he was thinking of some other sawmill operator.
